query: SELECT s.id, s.nome, s.ativo, COUNT(si.id) as issue_count FROM sprints s LEFT JOIN sprint_issues si ON s.id = si.sprintId GROUP BY s.id, s.nome, s.ativo;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2BqANL3ibNjmBV6.c742fa212ec3 --database nxXngtdn89K96fhSBqFM2N --execute SELECT s.id, s.nome, s.ativo, COUNT(si.id) as issue_count FROM sprints s LEFT JOIN sprint_issues si ON s.id = si.sprintId GROUP BY s.id, s.nome, s.ativo;
